package models

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for dto_to_model_mapping_in_handler: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Handlers that own transport-to-model mapping instead of dedicated mappers or services.
type CaseDtoToModelMappingInHandlerDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseDtoToModelMappingInHandlerModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseDtoToModelMappingInHandlerRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseDtoToModelMappingInHandlerModel
}

type CaseDtoToModelMappingInHandlerService struct {
    repo *CaseDtoToModelMappingInHandlerRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseDtoToModelMappingInHandlerAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeDtoToModelMappingInHandler(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseDtoToModelMappingInHandlerDTO) error {
    focus := "dto_to_model_mapping_in"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseDtoToModelMappingInHandlerDTO
    if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&request); err != nil {
        c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid request"})
        return nil
    }
    c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"id": request.ID, "status": request.Status})
    dto := CaseDtoToModelMappingInHandlerDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseDtoToModelMappingInHandlerModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    dto_model_mapping_handler_negative := map[string]int{"dto": 1, "model": 2, "mapping": 3, "handler": 4}
    dto_model_mapping_handler_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    dto_negative_0 := CaseDtoToModelMappingInHandlerDTO{ID: input, Status: "dto"}
    _ = dto_negative_0
    model_negative_1 := CaseDtoToModelMappingInHandlerDTO{ID: input, Status: "model"}
    _ = model_negative_1
    mapping_negative_2 := dto_model_mapping_handler_negative["mapping"] + len(input)
    _ = mapping_negative_2
    handler_negative_3 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_negative_3
    return nil
}
